title: 2026-07-05 Sapporo Lavender Gray Cool Wind
summary: Sapporo cool overcast Sunday set using lavender gray across a Horomitoge-style lavender hillside, Sapporo Art Park-style sculpture garden, Moerenuma Park-style open lawn, and Tanukikoji-style bookstore arcade.
summaryJa: 札幌のアルバム。色の軸はラベンダーグレー。構成は休日、ミュージアム、アクティブ、本とアーケード。

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Japanese-centered woman in a Horomitoge Lavender Garden-style hillside in Sapporo, crouching beside lavender rows with the city basin and pale gray overcast sky behind her, tying a gray trail sneaker while holding a small film-camera strap and glancing toward a friend just outside frame, wearing a lavender-gray short-sleeve knit polo, charcoal high-waist knee-length utility skirt, ivory windproof overshirt tied at the waist, opaque white ankle socks, gray trail sneakers, sage crossbody pouch, and silver hair clip
images.title: 01 Weekend Horomitoge lavender lace
images.locationDetail: Horomitoge Lavender Garden-style hillside in Sapporo

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman seated on a low stone bench in a Sapporo Art Park-style outdoor sculpture garden and museum approach, comparing a folded exhibition leaflet with a lavender fabric swatch near forest edge, pale concrete path, abstract sculpture silhouettes, and soft gray sky, wearing a smoky lavender sleeveless tailored vest over an ivory fine-gauge long-sleeve mesh knit, slate wide culotte trousers, thin black belt, matte black low-heeled ankle boots, small silver hoops, and compact charcoal shoulder bag
images.title: 02 Gallery Art Park swatch
images.locationDetail: Sapporo Art Park-style outdoor sculpture garden and museum approach

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman walking sideways on a Moerenuma Park-style open lawn in Sapporo near a geometric glass pyramid form, gripping the collar and hood edge of a pale lavender technical windbreaker as it billows in cool overcast wind, wearing the windbreaker open over a white fitted short-sleeve athletic tee, single-layer matte graphite nylon knee-length active half pants with side slits, matte lavender rib sport socks, black trail sandals, a slim running waist pouch, and simple stud earrings
images.title: 03 Active Moerenuma windbreaker
images.locationDetail: Moerenuma Park-style open lawn and geometric glass pyramid area in Sapporo

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman stepping out of a small independent bookstore or record-shop threshold in a Tanukikoji covered arcade-style Sapporo evening scene, tucking a paperback and postcard into a pale lavender canvas tote while looking over her shoulder toward a friend inside, wearing a charcoal fine-knit short cardigan open over a smoky lavender satin camisole, dark indigo straight jeans with cuffed hem, sheer gray ankle socks, black loafers, small pearl earrings, and a light scarf folded around the tote handle
images.title: 04 Bookstore Tanukikoji cardigan
images.locationDetail: Tanukikoji covered arcade-style Sapporo bookstore threshold
